content.en:
The Yun Zi Divine Maiden is rare in the time of the innate realm, but Ye Tian is not very rare.

He didn't care about the chances of the innate realm, the reason why he wanted to enter the innate realm was to copy the talents of other people.

"Copy the talent, shroud!"

Ye Tian enveloped the whole city and checked everyone's talents one by one.

I have to say that the talents of the strong who can be qualified to enter the innate realm are very good, and many of them are very old powerhouses, and the talents on them are naturally not simple.

"Three god-level supernatural talents!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised, you must know that the Innate Realm has only just opened, and there must be many people who have not come to the Innate Realm, but he didn't expect to find three god-level transcendent talents now, and they are three transcendent comprehension talents other than the Yunzi Divine Maiden.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian copied these three god-level super-realization talents into his hands, although fusing these three god-level super-realization talents could not make his god-level super-realization talents rise to the super god level, but at least it would be stronger than before.

Even if you can only improve a little bit, that's pretty good.

"It's a pity that I didn't see the super god-level super comprehension talent!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, this is also very normal, how terrible is the super god-level super-enlightenment talent, if someone really has such a talent, it must not be an ordinary Tianjiao, it is definitely the best of an era, crushing the Dao Ancestor I don't know how many times.

Although the comprehension is not absolute, but with the super god-level super comprehension talent, the comprehension must not be bad, as long as the luck is not bad, it will basically be accepted as a disciple by the Dao Ancestor.

Time passed day by day, and with the help of Dao Ancestors, the consciousness of the famous beings in the chaos entered the innate realm, and they cultivated here with the cultivation of the earth and broke into the origin world.

Everyone wants to get the Origin Talent, and even if someone has one Origin Talent, they definitely want a second Origin Talent.

Except for Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid there is no one who is unwilling to enter the Innate Realm.

It can be said that the powerhouses who are related to the entire chaos have come to the innate realm.

Billions of powerhouse consciousnesses gathered in the innate realm, making Ye Tian truly realize how many powerhouses there were in chaos.

At present, those powerhouses in the great universe are just a drop in the ocean of chaos.

----------

"There are a lot of copied talents, and even a few rare talents have been copied, but I haven't encountered a single super-god-level comprehension talent so far!" Ye Tian said regretfully.

If you can copy the super god-level super enlightenment talent, then it will be a real big profit!

Suddenly.

Ye Tian was stunned, and the person who had just come in caught his attention.

"Super God-level Super Enlightenment Talent !!"

Ye Tian was so excited that he instantly copied the other party's super-god-level super-comprehension talent, for fear that this person would disappear in an instant.

It wasn't until the talent was copied that he paid attention to the person's name and other talents.

"Who is this man?"

Ye Tian could only see this person's name and talent, but he didn't know anything about his origin.

It happened that Yanglong Tianjun was also in the innate realm, so Ye Tian summoned Yanglong Tianjun and asked him about the origin of his life.

He originally thought that Yanglong Tianjun didn't know the barbarians, after all, the chaos was too big, and it was normal not to know each other.

But I didn't expect that Yanglong Tianjun really knew about the situation of the brute.

"Master, the barbarian is very famous in the chaos, he is a true ancestor, but he is the most regrettable true ancestor, and he is also the most unlucky true ancestor!" Yang Long Tianjun transmitted: "The barbarian is known as the barbarian ancestor, but he is the ancestor of the barbarian god clan in the chaos. The talent of the barbarian ancestor is really good, and his understanding is very demonic. He can easily cultivate a Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level, and legend has it that the Barbarian Ancestor has many Chaos Divine Powers at the extreme level, and even has a Power Origin Talent, creating a Power Origin Divine Power, and cultivating this Power Origin Divine Power to an extremely high level. The reason why he said that he was a pity was because the Barbarian Ancestor was not born well, he was a native of a small Chaos Continent, and the Barbarian God Clan he was in was only a small race, and he didn't even have a Chaos Life, and the most powerful was only a half-step Chaos Life at the Earth Venerable level. Without a strong inheritance, and not knowing how to cultivate, the foundation of the barbarian ancestor was not very good, and he did not stay at the level of the god general, and he hit the realm of the Mandate of Heaven very early. This caused the foundation of the Barbarian Ancestor to be very poor, and it was not even as good as the ordinary geniuses in the chaos. Later, the barbarian ancestor obtained some good inheritances, and even practiced a lot of chaotic supernatural powers, but the foundation is the foundation, and if the foundation is not good, the potential is not enough, and no matter how good the understanding is, it is difficult to achieve. Therefore, the Barbarian Ancestor did not have the Dao Ancestor Master, and even when he was weak, even the True Ancestor did not look down on the Barbarian Ancestor. After a long period of time, the Barbarian Ancestor made progress step by step, and finally achieved the True Ancestor, and also spent a huge price to make up for a little foundation, but in the end, it was still not comparable to the True Ancestor who was promoted by the Nine Star God General. Therefore, it is a pity for the Barbarian Ancestor, otherwise, with his talent, if he worships a Dao Ancestor as a teacher, even if he can't become a Dao Ancestor now, he must be the most powerful True Ancestor......"

After listening to Yanglong Tianjun's summons, Ye Tian also felt sorry for this barbarian ancestor.

How good luck it is to have a super god-level super comprehension talent, but I didn't expect that because of the poor foundation, I can only become the top level among the true ancestors so far, and it is difficult to become the strongest true ancestors.

Although the Barbarian Ancestor was still far superior to countless True Ancestors, compared to those Invincible True Ancestors who could leapfrog and kill the weak Dao Ancestors, the Barbarian Ancestor was still too weak.

"My luck is really good, not only do I have the talent of copying, but I also worship a Taoist ancestor as a teacher, talent, chance, and background are all lacking, if there is no teacher, I may also have such a defect as a barbarian ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian also pretended to enter the origin world, killing the innate origin people to obtain the innate origin qi, although the innate origin qi did not help him, if he did not enter the origin world all the time, it would arouse the suspicion of others.

Time passed year by year, and except for the occasional entry into the origin world, Ye Tian spent the rest of his time on copying talents.

Before you know it, hundreds of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian came out of the innate realm.

......

"Since copying to the super god-level super-comprehension talent, I haven't encountered the super-god-level comprehension talent again. Or some Dao Ancestors have super god-level super-comprehension talents, but I can't touch the true body of Dao Ancestors. Forget it, being able to copy a super god-level super comprehension talent is already very good, you can't be too greedy!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Returning to the Void Heaven Palace, Ye Tian retreated again.

On this day, he was ready to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Technique to the Dacheng realm.

"Super god-level super enlightenment talent, open!"

"Enlightenment eternity does not extinguish the fire!"

As soon as Ye Tian came to his senses, he suddenly felt that his comprehension had improved too much, and the Eternal Unextinguishable Chaos Divine Power of Xiaocheng's peak realm, which had fallen into a bottleneck, gradually began to improve.

Thousands of years later, Ye Tian broke the shackles and raised the Eternal Immortal Immortal Immortal Chaos Divine Power to the Dacheng realm, and his strength suddenly skyrocketed.

"What a terrifying super god-level super comprehension talent, I didn't expect me to be able to raise the Eternal Immortal Fire Chaos Divine Power to the Dacheng realm so easily. "

Ye Tian was excited.

Immediately, he felt that he could go all out and strive to raise the Eternal Immortal Fire to the consummation realm, in that case, his strength would inevitably rise to a terrifying level.

As time slowly passed, the discussion about the innate realm in the great universe did not stop for a moment.

Everyone is talking about who has obtained an origin talent, and obtaining an origin talent is definitely something to be proud of, once you become a true ancestor, whether you have an origin talent or not is one of the criteria for measuring strength.

With the Origin Talent, you can create the Origin Divine Power, even the worst Origin Divine Power is far more powerful than the Chaos Divine Power.

It is worth mentioning that the Cloud Purple Priestess of the God of War Tower became famous during this time, and it was famous in the Great Universe, and even the entire Chaos.

Because the Yunzi Divine Maiden has obtained the Origin Talent, and it is two Origin Talents.

One is the Ice Origin Talent, and the other is the Strength Origin Talent.

It is already terrifying for someone to be able to obtain one Origin Talent, let alone two Origin Talents at once.

And the most terrifying thing is the Barbarian Ancestor, who suddenly obtained four origin talents in the innate realm.

Although the Barbarian Ancestor Foundation is not good, if he obtains the four Origin Talents at once, the Barbarian Ancestor can create a lot of Origin Divine Powers, so that his strength will be raised to another level.

As for Ye Tian, although his strength improved quickly, many people felt that Ye Tian was just powerful at the Heavenly Monarch level, and once he reached the True Ancestor level, his potential was at the end, and it was difficult to compete with others.

Because they felt that Ye Tian didn't have any origin talent, and he would not be able to create origin supernatural powers in the future.

Ye Tian ignored these rumors, he would not take the initiative to expose the secret that he had the full origin talent.

And the best way to break the rumors is strength!

If the strength of the top 50 on the Tianjun list is not enough, then the top 20, the top ten, or even the first place on the Tianjun list.

When his strength reaches a certain level, no one dares to underestimate him, and no one dares to spread rumors.

Tens of thousands of years later.

Ye Tian finally raised the Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguishing to the Consummation Realm, although it was still far from the limit level, Ye Tian's strength had improved too much.

The thirteenth place on the Tianjun List, this is Ye Tian's current ranking!

This strength is enough to suppress countless Heavenly Monarchs!
